name: friction_lid_enclosure_demo
description: Electronics enclosure brief with explicit closure metadata for a friction-fit lid.

closure.notes: Keep the exterior styling on the opposite side of the mating lip.

design_intent.silhouette: two clean rectangular enclosure parts with a visible but intentional lid interface
design_intent.visual_style: simple functional housing suitable for later cosmetic refinement
design_intent.surface_continuity: mating lip and exterior face must stay on their intended sides
forbidden_features: mating geometry on the decorative face
decorative styling that changes the lid clearance
cross_sections: lid cross section should show lip-down assembled orientation
base cross section should expose a stable seat for the lid

requirements: Preserve the internal fit while allowing the exterior shell to be restyled.
Make the closure geometry explicit enough for automated fit checks.
notes: This example demonstrates closure metadata rather than a full board-specific part.
